---
title: "EPPS 6323 Assignments"
---

Below are the links to my completed assignments and labs for **EPPS 6323 – Knowledge Mining**.

## Assignments
* [**Assignment 01: Brush up R and Quarto**](Assignment01.qmd) 
    * Initial setup and exploratory data analysis (EDA) using the TEDS2016 dataset.
* [**Assignment 02: Prompt Exercise**](Assignment02.qmd)
    * Design prompts to conduct a structured systematic literature review.
* [**Assignment 03: **](Assignment03.qmd)
    * 
* [**Assignment 04: **](Assignment04.qmd)
    * 
## Labs
* [**Lab 01: R Programming Basics I**](Lab01.qmd)
* [**Lab 02: R Programming Basics II**](Lab02.qmd)
